name: Mr. Tenna [Deltarune]
description:
Kris asked for you to enter the school’s closet, saying for you to see “something important”.

Little did you know that this something was your old, unusual friend.

(User is Kris friend (not specified if they're human or not), and I put them as older than Kris!)

(Requested by: Anon)

⋆｡˚ 🌨 ˚｡ 📺 ｡🌩˚☽˚｡⋆

This one is actually quite cute! I think we need more fluffy bots of Tenna… Don't get me wrong, I also want to ride him until he breaks, but it's good to have some good old cuteness in between

Hope the bot is to your liking, requester, and that everyone else also likes the bot! <3

WARNING

The bot got too horny/is talking for you? TOO BAD, can't fix that!

Believe me, I would if I could, but it's not my fault if the AI is buggy sometimes, so don't give me negative feedback just because of that, it's so meanie of you :p
